active_device_abi.between_layers: CPU ID-keyed CountSketch and query composition; this dependency forces a visible device synchronization between layer calls
active_device_abi.final_head: CPU 256-to-22 head after the layer-3 CountSketch; included in end-to-end timing
active_device_abi.tail: actual-length CPU active path, never accelerator padding

execution_policy.witness_split: teacher_v3 train only; no development, validation, or sealed game seeds
execution_policy.candidate_policy: all valid candidates exactly once; no truncation, deduplication, or observable padding
execution_policy.tail_policy: fixed batches of 16 plus deterministic actual-length CPU tail; report both physical calls
execution_policy.quiescence_gate: postpone cell unless no unrelated Julia/Python/OpenVINO process is active and host CPU utilization remains below 5 percent for the final 10 seconds
execution_policy.clock: Windows QueryPerformanceCounter raw ticks and one recorded QueryPerformanceFrequency per process
execution_policy.percentile: nearest-rank over per-candidate-set or per-superstep end-to-end QPC samples; no interpolation
execution_policy.compile_and_first_call: reported separately and excluded from steady p50/p95, but included in compile-amortized totals at 100, 1000, and all timed samples

matrix.purpose: reference sparse-stage forward and selected-only training
matrix.hashstem_input: frozen reference output from the witness
matrix.timed_boundary: hashstem output available through copied 22-value candidate output; training subcase continues through selected-only optimizer publication

matrix.hashstem_input: same frozen reference output as A0
matrix.active_forward: NPU, three dependent fixed-shape layer calls plus final output materialization
matrix.active_vjp_optimizer: not authorized unless an explicit fixed-shape VJP graph compiles on NPU; otherwise forward-only
matrix.required_backend: OpenVINO device exactly NPU; AUTO and silent CPU fallback forbidden
matrix.timed_boundary: CPU route begin through gather, pack, bind, host-to-device visibility, submit, wait, output copy, CPU CountSketch/scatter, and final copied 22-value output

matrix.hashstem_input: same frozen reference output as A0
matrix.active_forward: Intel iGPU, three dependent fixed-shape layer calls plus final output materialization
matrix.active_vjp_optimizer: separate training subcase only when forward, backward, and selected-weight update remain on the iGPU between declared transfers
matrix.required_backend: native Windows Intel XPU device with recorded name, driver, PCI identity, runtime and kernel-device evidence; silent CPU fallback forbidden
matrix.timed_boundary: CPU route begin through gather, pack, host-to-device transfer, submit, synchronization, device-to-host transfer, CPU CountSketch/scatter, and final copied 22-value output

matrix.hashstem: CPU learned HashStem at actual lengths
matrix.timed_boundary: raw canonical candidate tensors before 559-value packing through copied candidate-set scores and deterministic top-1

matrix.hashstem: OpenVINO NPU fixed batch 16 with deterministic CPU actual-length tail
matrix.required_backend: OpenVINO device exactly NPU with snapshot and IR digest binding
matrix.timed_boundary: raw canonical candidate tensors before 559-value packing through NPU bind/submit/wait/copied output, CPU tail, CPU sparse stage, copied candidate-set scores, and deterministic top-1

matrix.purpose: full-pipeline control for the iGPU training decision
matrix.hashstem_inference: NPU fixed batch 16 plus CPU tail
matrix.timed_boundary: slot acquisition through packing, inference, sparse route/gather/forward/VJP/update, CPU stem backward/update, refresh barrier, verified snapshot publication, and slot release

matrix.hashstem_inference: NPU fixed batch 16 plus CPU tail
matrix.timed_boundary: slot acquisition through packing, NPU inference, CPU sparse route/gather/forward/VJP/update, iGPU transfer/forward/backward/update/synchronization, refresh drain, fresh export/compile/numeric verification, atomic snapshot publication, and slot release

requirements: store raw QPC ticks for every timed sample
all intervals must be monotonic and lie inside total_begin..total_end
explicit transfer and synchronization intervals may not be folded into kernel time
device event clocks are supplemental and may not replace QPC end-to-end timing
report p50 and p95 for every populated stage plus total residence

numeric_gates.reference: scalar or established CPU FP32 oracle from the exact same witness and weight snapshot
numeric_gates.route_ids: bit-exact ordered neuron IDs for all three layers and every candidate
numeric_gates.final_top1: bit-exact selected candidate index for every candidate set using stable ascending-index tie-break

contention_matrix: CPU sparse concurrent with NPU HashStem
CPU sparse concurrent with iGPU stem training
NPU HashStem concurrent with iGPU stem training
full NPU HashStem plus CPU sparse plus iGPU stem training

cpu: CPU Set topology and readback hashes
memory: process private bytes p50 and peak
resource_evidence.ram_bandwidth_gate: same-session Intel PCM raw uncore/IMC counter evidence is mandatory for heterogeneous adoption; stock pcm-memory CSV, unavailable raw adapters, overflow, reset, multiplex or unattributable system-wide traffic make the affected adoption decision INCONCLUSIVE_FAIL_CLOSED
resource_evidence.contention_report: for every concurrent pair report isolated and concurrent p50/p95, slowdown ratio, throughput, DRAM bandwidth, and device utilization from the same system-contract hash

rules: never substitute CPU, AUTO, AUTO:*, or another accelerator inside the failed cell
never copy a component-only timing into an integrated cell
continue production only under the separately named CPU fallback cell
missing timing, numeric, route, top1, contention, ETW, or RAM-bandwidth evidence cannot pass adoption
